message:
feat: visual improvements to hero, featured sites, and TL;DR page

Hero improvements:
- Redesigned star badge for MCP Agent Mail with amber gradient, star
  icon, and subtle ring to match project card styling

Featured sites improvements:
- Updated to display actual OG images from external sites
- Added fallback to styled gradient/icon design if images fail to load
- Improved card styling with better spacing and hover effects
- Added small favicon-style icon next to domain name

TL;DR page improvements:
- Widened curl command container from max-w-2xl to max-w-4xl
- Added copy button with animated feedback (Check icon + tooltip)
- Improved overall styling of the command section

Config:
- Added jeffreysprompts.com and agent-flywheel.com to allowed image
  domains for Next.js Image optimization

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
